description: A file meets the cloud-based machine learning lowest confidence threshold for malicious files. Detection is based on a high degree of entropy, packing, anti-malware evasion, or other similarity to known malware.
display_name: Machine Learning Identified Lowest Confidence Malicious File
name: LowestConfidenceMalware

description: A process appears to be using a Remote Monitoring and Management (RMM) application in a suspicious manner. This may be an attempt to gather information, gain access, or drop other malicious payloads. Investigate the process tree and the detected process.
name: SuspiciousRMMUsage

description: A process appears to be using a Remote Monitoring and Management (RMM) application in a suspicious manner. This may be an attempt to gather information, gain access, or drop other malicious payloads. Investigate the process tree and the detected process.
name: SuspiciousRMMUsage

description: A process has opened a handle to a Falcon process with excessive permissions requested. If this is unexpected, review the process tree and surrounding events.
name: SensorHandleOpenedLow

description: A process has written a suspicious file to disk. Adversaries may write a malicious file to a commonly trusted directory, use a benign name, or a mismatched file extension. This is done for the sake of evading defenses and observation. Check the activity and surrounding events are expected in your environment.
name: SuspiciousFileWritten
